summary: Tested Professional Dashboard for crypto marketplace - Course Management feature. All backend API endpoints pass (16/16 tests). Frontend login, navigation, course list, course editor, and modals all functional. Fixed missing translation key 'pro.courses.create'.
seed_data_creation: Used existing Masterclass Crypto Trading course with modules and lessons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional dashboard course management is fully functional. Backend APIs for courses, modules, lessons, and quizzes all pass. Frontend UI shows course list, course editor with expandable modules, and all modals (Add Module, Add Lesson, Add Quiz, New Course) work correctly. One minor translation key issue found.

frontend_tests.login: PASSED - Admin login with credentials works
frontend_tests.course_list_display: PASSED - Masterclass Crypto Trading course displayed with correct data
frontend_tests.course_editor_navigation: PASSED - Edit content button navigates to /pro/course/{id}
frontend_tests.course_editor_content: PASSED - Shows modules, lessons, quiz sections
frontend_tests.add_module_modal: PASSED - Modal opens with title, description fields, Create button
frontend_tests.add_lesson_modal: PASSED - Modal opens with title, content, video URL, duration fields
frontend_tests.new_course_modal: PASSED - Modal opens with all fields (title, description, price, category, difficulty)
